name: James Mitchell
bio: Former ATP tour player with over 15 years of elite coaching experience. James leads our performance pathway and has developed multiple collegiate champions.

name: Ana Rodriguez
bio: Ana specializes in building strong technical foundations for young players. Her energetic approach makes learning tennis fun while developing discipline and athleticism.

name: Tyler Brooks
bio: Tyler brings a sports science approach to tennis training, focusing on agility, injury prevention, and court movement efficiency for players of all levels.

name: Rachel Chen
bio: Rachel creates engaging programs for adult players, from beginners picking up a racquet for the first time to competitive league players seeking refinement.

name: James Carter
bio: James brings a strategic mindset to every session, helping competitive players read opponents, construct points, and perform under pressure. Former Division I coach with a focus on match intelligence.

name: Lisa Wong
bio: Lisa specializes in building strong fundamentals for young players through engaging, high-energy sessions. Her programs blend technical skill with athletic development and a love for competition.
